# Assessment Facts Overview

This index provides quick navigation to supplementary architecture and assessment artifacts generated for this report.

- [Architecture Diagram](./architecture-diagram.md) — High-level application architecture and component relationship diagrams.
- [Dependency Map](./dependency-map.md) — External dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [API & Service Communication Contracts](./api-service-contracts.md) — Endpoint catalog, service contracts, communication patterns, and sequence flow.
- [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](./data-architecture.md) — Database configuration, entity model, repository methods, and data boundaries.
- [Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](./configuration-inventory.md) — Configuration sources, profiles, properties, secrets handling, and runtime settings.
- [Core Business Workflows](./business-workflows.md) — Domain workflows, decision logic, and business process sequence.
